query:
SELECT 'animals' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN isActive=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active FROM animals
UNION ALL SELECT 'lambing_log', COUNT(*), NULL FROM lambing_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'weight_log', COUNT(*), NULL FROM weight_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'expenses', COUNT(*), NULL FROM expenses
UNION ALL SELECT 'feed_stock_ledger', COUNT(*), NULL FROM feed_stock_ledger
UNION ALL SELECT 'feed_items', COUNT(*), NULL FROM feed_items
UNION ALL SELECT 'species', COUNT(*), NULL FROM species
UNION ALL SELECT 'animal_categories', COUNT(*), NULL FROM animal_categories;
